creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jochen Neumeister from comment #3)

You can find the changelogs here:
https://ircii.warped.com/ircii-current/NEWS

Observe that the ircII version in ports tree is now 20151120, hence we missed a few versions and more than a changelog concerns this update.

Moreover, there is a changelog fo version 20170913, but I could not find any trace of that version and according to http://www.eterna.com.au/ircii/ the last version is indeed 20170704.
